children.name: BaMo (“Bahay Mo”) is a presentation design project focused on creating a professional and visually compelling pitch deck. The goal was to clearly communicate the brand’s vision, value proposition, and business potential in a way that resonates with stakeholders.

children.name: This project involved designing a structured and engaging pitch deck to support business presentation and decision-making. Deliverables: UI Screens, Interactive Figma Prototype, AI Chat UI, Dashboard Design, Design System
